title: zerna purgans
intro: Zerna purgans, commonly known as senna, is a plant-based laxative derived from the leaves of the senna plant (Cassia senna or Senna alexandrina). The health benefits of Zerna purgans include its ability to relieve constipation, promote bowel movements, and support the treatment of hemorrhoids. Its therapeutic actions are primarily attributed to its anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate the muscles in the digestive tract and increase the frequency of bowel movements. The bioactive constituents of Zerna purgans include sennosides A and B, as well as other anthraquinone glycosides that contribute to its laxative properties.
side_effects: Zerna purgans can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing diarrhea, vomiting, and stomach cramps due to its cathartic properties. Prolonged use can lead to electrolyte imbalance, dehydration, and even kidney damage. In severe cases, excessive use of the plant can cause hypokalemia, a condition characterized by abnormally low potassium levels in the blood. Additionally, improper use may also lead to allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and itching.
